transcription.text: Here's an entirely new way to look at your stomach disturbances. This is an illustration of your nerve system. These are your stomach nerves. In acid upset, these nerves act up and you may get stomach spasms that can build up more excess acid. The conventional antacid you now use may relieve excess acid but does not act directly on stomach spasms. Here's a new medication that does both at once. It's called triactin. Triactin calms stomach spasms as it reduces harmful excess acid to harmless liquid. Only triactin has this anti acid antispasm formula. Anti acid to eliminate excess acid plus antispasm to calm stomach spasms that may aggravate your upset. New good tasting triactin, liquid or chewable tablets. Calm stomach spasms to help stop excess acid upset.
